message:
ci: improve GitHub Actions workflows with best practices

CI workflow (ci.yml):
- Add concurrency control to cancel in-progress runs for same PR
- Pin ludeeus/action-shellcheck to v2.0.0 for reproducibility
- Add workflow-level NODE_VERSION env var for consistency
- Add timeout-minutes to all jobs to prevent hanging workflows
- Improve cache key to include package-lock.json
- Add ~/.npm to cache paths for better npm caching

Release workflow (release.yml):
- Add concurrency control to prevent concurrent releases
- Upgrade softprops/action-gh-release from v1 to v2
- Add job outputs for version to share between jobs
- Add fail_on_unmatched_files for stricter release validation
- Add fetch-depth: 0 for proper git history in update job
- Use job outputs instead of re-parsing GITHUB_REF

ACFS notification workflow:
- Consolidate duplicate workflows (remove notify-acfs.yml)
- Add comprehensive header documentation
- Improve token validation with proper GitHub Actions error annotation
- Enrich client payload with tool name, actor, and timestamp
- Add dispatch summary logging step
- Add timeout-minutes for job

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +1,17 @@
+# .github/workflows/acfs-checksums-dispatch.yml
+#
+# Notifies ACFS (Agentic Coding Flywheel Setup) when installer scripts change,
+# triggering automatic checksum updates in the downstream repository.
+#
+# Setup:
+#   1. Create a PAT with 'contents:read' scope on Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
+#   2. Add it as a secret named ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN in this repo
+#
+# Triggers:
+#   - Push to main/master that modifies install.sh or scripts/install.sh
+#   - New release published
+#   - Manual workflow dispatch (for testing)
+#
 name: Notify ACFS checksum monitor
 
 on:
@@ -12,19 +26,39 @@ on:
 
 jobs:
   dispatch:
+    name: Dispatch to ACFS
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 5
     steps:
-      - name: Ensure dispatch token
-        if: ${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN == '' }}
+      - name: Validate dispatch token
         run: |
-          echo "Missing secret ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN. Add a PAT with repo access for Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup." >&2
-          exit 1
-      - name: Dispatch to ACFS
-        if: ${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN != '' }}
+          if [[ -z "${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN }}" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Missing secret ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN"
+            echo "Add a PAT with repo access for Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+      - name: Dispatch upstream-changed event
         uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
         with:
           token: ${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN }}
           repository: Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
           event-type: upstream-changed
           client-payload: |
-            {"repo":"${{ github.repository }}","ref":"${{ github.ref }}","sha":"${{ github.sha }}","event":"${{ github.event_name }}"}
+            {
+              "tool": "${{ github.event.repository.name }}",
+              "repo": "${{ github.repository }}",
+              "ref": "${{ github.ref }}",
+              "sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
+              "event": "${{ github.event_name }}",
+              "actor": "${{ github.actor }}",
+              "timestamp": "${{ github.event.head_commit.timestamp || github.event.release.published_at }}"
+            }
+
+      - name: Log dispatch summary
+        run: |
+          echo "Dispatched upstream-changed event to ACFS"
+          echo "  Tool: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}"
+          echo "  Event: ${{ github.event_name }}"
+          echo "  SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"
+          echo "  Actor: ${{ github.actor }}"

@@ -9,15 +9,24 @@ on:
   schedule:
     - cron: '0 3 * * *'
 
+# Cancel in-progress runs for the same branch/PR
+concurrency:
+  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}
+
+env:
+  NODE_VERSION: '20'
+
 jobs:
   shellcheck:
     name: ShellCheck
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 10
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Run ShellCheck on giil
-        uses: ludeeus/action-shellcheck@master
+        uses: ludeeus/action-shellcheck@2.0.0
         with:
           scandir: '.'
           severity: warning
@@ -30,6 +39,7 @@ jobs:
   syntax-check:
     name: Syntax Validation
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 10
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
@@ -42,7 +52,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: '20'
+          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
 
       - name: Extract and validate embedded JavaScript
         run: |
@@ -59,13 +69,14 @@ jobs:
   unit-tests:
     name: Unit Tests
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 10
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Setup Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: '20'
+          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
 
       - name: Install test dependencies
         run: |
@@ -93,13 +104,15 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: '20'
+          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
 
       - name: Cache giil dependencies
         uses: actions/cache@v4
         with:
-          path: .ci-cache
-          key: ${{ runner.os }}-giil-${{ hashFiles('giil') }}
+          path: |
+            .ci-cache
+            ~/.npm
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-giil-${{ hashFiles('giil', 'package-lock.json') }}
           restore-keys: |
             ${{ runner.os }}-giil-
 
@@ -119,6 +132,7 @@ jobs:
   install-test:
     name: Installation Test
     needs: [shellcheck, syntax-check, unit-tests]
+    timeout-minutes: 10
     strategy:
       fail-fast: false
       matrix:
@@ -160,13 +174,15 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: '20.10.0'
+          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
 
       - name: Cache giil dependencies
         uses: actions/cache@v4
         with:
-          path: .ci-cache
-          key: ${{ runner.os }}-giil-${{ hashFiles('giil') }}
+          path: |
+            .ci-cache
+            ~/.npm
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-giil-${{ hashFiles('giil', 'package-lock.json') }}
           restore-keys: |
             ${{ runner.os }}-giil-
 
@@ -177,6 +193,7 @@ jobs:
   version-consistency:
     name: Version Consistency
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 5
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4

@@ -1,46 +0,0 @@
-# .github/workflows/notify-acfs.yml
-#
-# Notifies ACFS when installer scripts change, triggering checksum updates.
-# Use this template for repos with install.sh at the repository root.
-#
-# Setup:
-#   1. Create a PAT with 'contents:read' on agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
-#   2. Add it as a secret named ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN in this repo
-#   3. Copy this file to .github/workflows/notify-acfs.yml
-#
-# Related: agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-b04c
-#
-name: Notify ACFS of Installer Changes
-
-on:
-  push:
-    branches: [main, master]
-    paths:
-      - 'install.sh'
-  workflow_dispatch:  # Manual trigger for testing
-
-jobs:
-  notify-acfs:
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    steps:
-      - name: Trigger ACFS checksum update
-        uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
-        with:
-          token: ${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN }}
-          repository: Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
-          event-type: upstream-changed
-          client-payload: |
-            {
-              "tool": "${{ github.event.repository.name }}",
-              "ref": "${{ github.ref }}",
-              "sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
-              "actor": "${{ github.actor }}",
-              "timestamp": "${{ github.event.head_commit.timestamp }}"
-            }
-
-      - name: Log dispatch
-        run: |
-          echo "✅ Dispatched upstream-changed event to ACFS"
-          echo "   Tool: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}"
-          echo "   SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"
-          echo "   Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"

@@ -5,13 +5,21 @@ on:
     tags:
       - 'v*'
 
+# Prevent concurrent releases
+concurrency:
+  group: release-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: false
+
 permissions:
   contents: write
 
 jobs:
   release:
     name: Create Release with Checksums
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
+    outputs:
+      version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
@@ -73,7 +81,7 @@ jobs:
           sed -i 's/^          //' release_notes.md
 
       - name: Create GitHub Release
-        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1
+        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
         with:
           name: giil v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
           body_path: release_notes.md
@@ -85,20 +93,23 @@ jobs:
             install.sh.sha256
           generate_release_notes: true
           append_body: true
+          fail_on_unmatched_files: true
 
   update-version-file:
     name: Update VERSION file
     needs: release
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 5
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
           ref: main
           token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+          fetch-depth: 0
 
       - name: Update VERSION file
         run: |
-          VERSION="${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}"
+          VERSION="${{ needs.release.outputs.version }}"
           echo "$VERSION" > VERSION
           echo "Updated VERSION to: $VERSION"
 
@@ -113,6 +124,6 @@ jobs:
           if git diff --staged --quiet; then
             echo "VERSION file already up to date"
           else
-            git commit -m "chore: update VERSION to ${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v} [skip ci]"
+            git commit -m "chore: update VERSION to ${{ needs.release.outputs.version }} [skip ci]"
             git push
           fi
